      - Scoping out Hopper. Finalizing with Avi on monday

      - Scoping. Finalizing soon.
  - Mixed Operation: Peter Redman

      - [EC-16311]: Deprecate ego_vehicle_metadata (ObjectMetadata) in favor of VehicleMetadata
      - [EC-16434]: Deprecate BedrockObjectManager in favor of BedrockVehicleManager

      - [EC-16667]: Tag x2v detections with correct semantic labels
      - [EC-16314]: Motion-compensate X2V detections
      - [EC-16316]: Uncertainty growth for X2V detections
      - [EC-16310]: Wire new vehicle metadata from bedrock to object tracker
      - [EC-16339]: Extract BedrockStreamingRequest building logic into bedrock_request_builder library
